taxonomy: Dinebra marquisensis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass that is native to the island of Marquesas, which is part of French Polynesia. The classification of Dinebra marquisensis falls under the kingdom Plantae, phylum Liliophyta, class Liliopsida, order Poales, and family Poaceae. Further classification can also be made into the genus Dinebra and the species Dinebra marquisensis. The classification of Dinebra marquisensis is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup.
